overview.description: The John Hancock Corporate Bond ETF (JHCB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed to focus on investment-grade corporate bonds, of any maturity, that are perceived as undervalued. JHCB was launched on Mar 30, 2021 and is issued by John Hancock.
